lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣੈ ਹਥਿ ਵਡਿਆਈਆ ਦੇ ਨਾਮੇ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aapanai hath vaddiaaeea de naame laae |
lines.english: Glory is in His Hands; He bestows His Name, and attaches us to it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਪਾਏ ॥੮॥੪॥੨੬॥
lines.translit: naanak naam nidhaan man vasiaa vaddiaaee paae |8|4|26|
lines.english: O Nanak, the treasure of the Naam abides within the mind, and glory is obtained. ||8||4||26||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਮਨ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਇ ਤੂੰ ਆਪੇ ਆਇ ਮਿਲੈ ਮੇਰੇ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sun man man vasaae toon aape aae milai mere bhaaee |
lines.english: Listen, O mortal: enshrine His Name within your mind; He shall come to meet with you, O my Sibling of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸਚੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: anadin sachee bhagat kar sachai chit laaee |1|
lines.english: Night and day, center your consciousness on true devotional worship of the True Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਤੂੰ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਮੇਰੇ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: eko naam dhiaae toon sukh paaveh mere bhaaee |
lines.english: Meditate on the One Naam, and you shall find peace, O my Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਦੂਜਾ ਦੂਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਵਡੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: haumai doojaa door kar vaddee vaddiaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Eradicate egotism and duality, and your glory shall be glorious. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਭਗਤੀ ਨੋ ਸੁਰਿ ਨਰ ਮੁਨਿ ਜਨ ਲੋਚਦੇ ਵਿਣੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪਾਈ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eis bhagatee no sur nar mun jan lochade vin satigur paaee na jaae |
lines.english: The angels, humans and silent sages long for this devotional worship, but without the True Guru, it cannot be attained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੈ ਥੈ ਸਭੁ ਰਖਿਓਨੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: aapai thai sabh rakhion kichh kehan na jaaee |
lines.english: He Himself keeps all in His Hand; nothing else can be said.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਡਿਤ ਪੜਦੇ ਜੋਤਿਕੀ ਤਿਨ ਬੂਝ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: panddit parrade jotikee tin boojh na paae |2|
lines.english: The Pandits, the religious scholars, and the astrologers read their books, but they do not understand. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਦੇਇ ਸੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਰਿ ਬੂਝ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aape dee su paaeeai gur boojh bujhaaee |3|
lines.english: Whatever He gives, is received. The Guru has imparted this understanding to me. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਦਾ ਕਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਖੀਐ ਜੇ ਦੂਜਾ ਹੋਈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: mandaa kis no aakheeai je doojaa hoee |4|
lines.english: So who can we call bad, since there is no other? ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਸਭਿ ਤਿਸ ਦੇ ਸਭਨਾ ਕਾ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant sabh tis de sabhanaa kaa soee |
lines.english: All beings and creatures are His; He belongs to all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੋ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਏਕਾ ਸਿਰਿ ਕਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: eiko hukam varatadaa ekaa sir kaaraa |
lines.english: The Command of the One Lord is pervading throughout; duty to the One Lord is upon the heads of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਭਵਾਲੀ ਦਿਤੀਅਨੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਲੋਭੁ ਵਿਕਾਰਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: aap bhavaalee diteean antar lobh vikaaraa |5|
lines.english: He Himself has led them astray, and placed greed and corruption within their hearts. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਭੀ ਓਨਾ ਨੋ ਬਖਸੀਅਨੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਭੰਡਾਰਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: bhagat bhee onaa no bakhaseean antar bhanddaaraa |6|
lines.english: He grants devotional worship to them, and within them is the treasure. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕ ਆਪੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕੀਤਿਅਨੁ ਬੂਝਨਿ ਵੀਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: eik aape guramukh keetian boojhan veechaaraa |
lines.english: He has sanctified those few Gurmukhs who understand Him, and reflect upon Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰ ਮਹਿ ਪੰਚ ਵਰਤਦੇ ਪੰਚੇ ਵੀਚਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: ghar meh panch varatade panche veechaaree |
lines.english: Within the homes of their bodies, the five passions are pervading, but here, the five are well-behaved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨੀਆ ਨੋ ਸਭੁ ਸਚੁ ਹੈ ਸਚੁ ਸੋਝੀ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: giaaneea no sabh sach hai sach sojhee hoee |
lines.english: The spiritual teachers know nothing but the Truth; they obtain true understanding.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਭੁਲਾਏ ਕਿਸੈ ਦੇ ਨ ਭੁਲਨੑੀ ਸਚੁ ਜਾਣਨਿ ਸੋਈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: oe bhulaae kisai de na bhulanaee sach jaanan soee |7|
lines.english: They are led astray by Him, but they do not go astray, because they know the True Lord. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਵਸਿ ਨ ਆਵਨੑੀ ਨਾਮਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰੀ ॥੮॥੫॥੨੭॥
lines.translit: naanak bin satigur vas na aavanaee naam haumai maaree |8|5|27|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the True Guru, they are not overcome; through the Naam, the ego is conquered. ||8||5||27||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸਭੁ ਵਥੁ ਹੈ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: gharai andar sabh vath hai baahar kichh naahee |
lines.english: Everything is within the home of your own self; there is nothing beyond it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਪਾਈਐ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਕਪਟ ਖੁਲਾਹੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee paaeeai antar kapatt khulaahee |1|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, it is obtained, and the doors of the inner heart are opened wide. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur te har paaeeai bhaaee |
lines.english: From the True Guru, the Lord's Name is obtained, O Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਪੂਰੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਆ ਦਿਖਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: antar naam nidhaan hai poorai satigur deea dikhaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The treasure of the Naam is within; the Perfect True Guru has shown this to me. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰੁ ਖੋਲੈ ਦਿਬ ਦਿਸਟਿ ਦੇਖੈ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਭੰਡਾਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: andar kholai dib disatt dekhai mukat bhanddaaraa |2|
lines.english: He opens the doors deep within, and through the Eyes of Divine Vision, beholds the treasure of liberation. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਗਾਹਕੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੋ ਲਏ ਪਾਏ ਰਤਨੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa gaahak hovai so le paae ratan veechaaraa |
lines.english: One who is a buyer of the Lord's Name, finds it, and obtains the jewel of contemplation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰਿ ਮਹਲ ਅਨੇਕ ਹਹਿ ਜੀਉ ਕਰੇ ਵਸੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: andar mehal anek heh jeeo kare vaseraa |
lines.english: There are so many mansions within the body; the soul dwells within them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਚਿੰਦਿਆ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਇਸੀ ਫਿਰਿ ਹੋਇ ਨ ਫੇਰਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: man chindiaa fal paaeisee fir hoe na feraa |3|
lines.english: He obtains the fruits of his mind's desires, and he shall not have to go through reincarnation again. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਖੀਆ ਵਥੁ ਸਮਾਲਿ ਲਈ ਗੁਰ ਸੋਝੀ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: paarakheea vath samaal lee gur sojhee hoee |
lines.english: The appraisers cherish the commodity of the Name; they obtain understanding from the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਅਮੁਲੁ ਸਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਵੈ ਕੋਈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: naam padaarath amul saa guramukh paavai koee |4|
lines.english: The wealth of the Naam is priceless; how few are the Gurmukhs who obtain it. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮੇ ਭੂਲਾ ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਫਿਰੈ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਪਤਿ ਗਵਾਈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: bharame bhoolaa sabh jag firai manamukh pat gavaaee |5|
lines.english: The entire world is wandering around, deluded by doubt; the self-willed manmukhs lose their honor. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਹਰੁ ਭਾਲੇ ਸੁ ਕਿਆ ਲਹੈ ਵਥੁ ਘਰੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: baahar bhaale su kiaa lahai vath gharai andar bhaaee |
lines.english: Searching outwardly, what can anyone find? The commodity is deep within the home of the self, O Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑੀ ਘਰੁ ਜਾਤਾ ਆਪਣਾ ਸੇ ਸੁਖੀਏ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jinaee ghar jaataa aapanaa se sukhee bhaaee |
lines.english: Those who know their own home, are happy, O Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੋਰੈ ਵਾਂਗੂ ਪਕੜੀਐ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਚੋਟਾ ਖਾਈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: chorai vaangoo pakarreeai bin naavai chottaa khaaee |6|
lines.english: Like a thief, he is caught, and without the Naam, he is beaten and struck down. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰੁ ਦਰੁ ਛੋਡੇ ਆਪਣਾ ਪਰ ਘਰਿ ਝੂਠਾ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: ghar dar chhodde aapanaa par ghar jhootthaa jaaee |
lines.english: The false one leaves his own hearth and home, and goes out to another's home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: antar braham pachhaaniaa gur kee vaddiaaee |7|
lines.english: They realize God within their own hearts, through the glorious greatness of the Guru. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਦਾਨੁ ਕਰੇ ਕਿਸੁ ਆਖੀਐ ਆਪੇ ਦੇਇ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: aape daan kare kis aakheeai aape dee bujhaaee |
lines.english: He Himself gives gifts, and He Himself bestows understanding; unto whom can we complain?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਤੂੰ ਦਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਈ ॥੮॥੬॥੨੮॥
lines.translit: naanak naam dhiaae toon dar sachai sobhaa paaee |8|6|28|
lines.english: O Nanak, meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, and you shall obtain glory in the True Court. ||8||6||28||
